title: ASCII Reference Implementation Expansion
problem: merman-ascii needs a tracked plan for learning from mermaid-ascii and beautiful-mermaid while preserving its model-driven Rust boundary.
gates: cargo clippy -p merman-ascii -p merman --features ascii --all-targets -- -D warnings

evidence.result: opened reference implementation expansion lane and recorded MIT provenance for mermaid-ascii and beautiful-mermaid
implemented first classDiagram ASCII/Unicode slice from RenderSemanticModel::Class with class boxes, members, methods, one extension relationship, focused tests, and verification evidence
expanded single-relationship classDiagram ASCII rendering to dependency, aggregation, composition, labels, orientation, dotted dependency lines, and Unicode markers from typed RelationShape constants

continue_policy.notes: Continue with bounded implementation slices. ARI-040 can start ER ASCII from the merman-core typed model; ARI-050 remains independently startable for xychart. Class multi-relationship graph layout should be split as a follow-on if prioritized. Do not port parsers from reference repositories.
